title: Genesis Tetrahedron Model (GTM) & Tensor Value Creation - Bipolar Void Theory v2.0
description: A multidimensional mathematical model of value creation starting from the bipolar void (0,0), using tensor products and tetrahedron symmetry. This v2.0 adds Chapter 11: Law of Triple Bipolar Inversion (XYZ=-1, XYZπ=1) connecting quaternion, spin 1/2 fermion 720° rotation, and tetrahedral vacuum. The model describes creation of space from void, Platonic symmetry, and cosmic energy budget 25%:75%.
